results.title: Data Engineer  at Verisign
highlights:
Data Engineer at Verisign
...
# Data Engineer at Verisign
...
#### Job Description
...
Within Verisign, our Data Engineering Team is responsible for designing, building and maintaining large-scale, high-throughput (millions requests per second) data products and services delivering actionable operational and business intelligence. To help us advance our products, we are looking for a skilled Mid-Level Data Engineer.
...
An ideal candidate should deeply care about all steps of data lifecycle (ingestion, enhancement, storage, processing, visualization), be fluent in a JVM-based language, and be eager to learn as needed. They should have an understanding of fundamentals including core Computer Science concepts accompanied by hands-on problem-solving experience ideally involving large-scale distributed systems. Obtaining these competencies often requires an equivalent of a bachelor’s degree and 5 years of practical work experience. We are also open to other career paths.
...
The candidate will be involved in all aspects of data engineering, including ideation, design, implementation, deployment, customer onboarding, and support. This will often imply regular cross-team collaboration with Verisign Data Platform, Business, Infrastructure, Engineering, Security, and Operations. We expect the candidate to take full ownership of the data products, regularly interacting with the internal customers, proactively identifying, prioritizing, and delivering on their common data needs.
...
Key Responsibilities:
...
- Design, build and optimize real-time and batch data processing pipelines.
- Develop and maintain data processing components that implement transformation, normalization, and enrichment logic.
- Build and maintain interactive dashboards and visualizations for internal stakeholders.
- Develop and maintain containerized workloads deployed in Kubernetes environments using CI/CD automation.
- Ensure system and data pipelines reliability through monitoring, observability, and alerting practices.
- Troubleshoot complex issues in distributed data systems and resolve performance bottlenecks.
- Support internal customers using data products and analytical platforms.
- Contribute to continuous improvement by applying data engineering best practices, particularly in hybrid cloud environments.
...
- Strong programming fundamentals with experience in object-oriented or functional programming languages
- Experience working with data lake and analytical technologies (e.g., Iceberg, Druid, Hive, Object Storage).
- Familiarity with streaming data platforms such as Apache Kafka.
- Experience implementing CI/CD pipelines (e.g. Jenkins).
- Strong analytical, troubleshooting, and problem-solving skills.
- Ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional stakeholders.

Preferred Skills

- Proficiency in Java or other JVM-based programming languages (e.g., Scala).
- Hands-on experience with distributed data processing frameworks such as Apache Spark or Akka Streams.
- Experience with containerization and orchestration technologies (Docker, Kubernetes) in production environments.
- Strong understanding of distributed systems concepts and performance optimization.
- Experience working in large-scale, production-grade data environments.
- Experience with delivering business insights by leveraging data visualization tools such as Grafana, Tableau or Superset.
...
- Bachelor’s degree in computer science or a related technical field, or equivalent combination of education and experience
- Prior experience developing and managing production-grade data pipelines
- Achieving this skill-set typically requires a minimum of 5 years of relevant industry experience in addition to a Bachelors or Masters degree, but we are open to alternative career paths
...

# Database Site Reliability Engineer at Verisign

#### Job Description
...
Verisign is looking for a Database SRE with experience managing and maintaining highly available large transaction volume databases. As a member of the Provisioning Operations Database Team, you’ll manage Oracle/Postgres DBs in support of key services that make the internet work. The ideal candidate will work with other DBA SREs, application engineers, Infrastructure teams, Security and Project Managers maintaining critical internet infrastructure.
...
- Maintain and support complex, mission-critical applications
- On-call support in a 24x7/365 operational environment
- Support Oracle and Postgres databases including installation of new software releases, system upgrades, evaluate and install patches
- Resolve software and hardware related problems
- Database monitoring, performance tuning, and administration
- Create shell, SQL and automation scripts
- Implement, maintain and test backup and recovery processes
- Enforce security measures to protect company data
...
- Bachelor’s degree in computer science/engineering/information systems or equivalent work experience
- 8+ years Production Support experience
- Expertise in Oracle and Postgres database administration, including building, Patching and upgrading
- Experience monitoring database growth and trends to ensure adequate capacity (memory, compute power and storage)
...
- Solid understanding and experience in security best practices for production databases
- Expertise in database replication technologies such as Oracle Dataguard, Dataguard Broker, Fast Start Fail Over and Golden Gate
- Performance tools AWR, ASH, and Oracle Enterprise Manager
- Expertise in Backup and Recovery RMAN, PGBackup
- Postgres Hot standby with streaming replication
- Strong skills with Linux/Unix operating system
- Scripting abilities including shell scripts, automation tools such as Ansible
- Ability to diagnose and correct problems

results.title: Full Stack Software Engineer @ Verisign | WorkPortal
highlights:
Full Stack Software Engineer @ Verisign | WorkPortal
...
# Full Stack Software Engineer @ Verisign
...
Verisign helps enable the security, stability, and resiliency of the internet. We are a trusted provider of internet infrastructure services for the networked world and deliver unmatched performance in domain name system (DNS) services. We are a mission focused, values driven company where each individual can contribute to building a stronger, more secure internet. We offer a dynamic and flexible work environment with competitive benefits and the ability to grow your career.Verisign is seeking a Mid-level Software Engineer with a strong foundation in full-stack java development to join our NameStudio software development team. An ideal candidate should be fluent in Java, have full-stack experience including ReactJS and be eager to learn as needed. In the candidate, we seek a demonstrated understanding of software engineering fundamentals, including core Computer Science concepts, as well as hands-on problem-solving experience building software systems. Obtaining these competencies often requires an equivalent of a bachelor’s degree and 8 years of hands-on work experience. We remain open to other career paths. The candidate will be involved in all aspects of product development including ideation, design, implementation, deployment, and issue resolution. This will usually imply cross-team collaboration with Product, Engineering, Security and Operations. Product NameStudio suite includes a number of internal and public facing UI and API applications to serve the needs of our Registry and Product business teams. Many of our services are deployed in AWS and the rest are in the process of migration from our data centers to the cloud. Name Studio API is a Java, Spring Boot application, implementing algorithms and using external libraries (such as Tensorflow) to generate domain suggestions. The system applies a combination of Large Language Models and state-of-the-art neural language models to generate domain names across 10+ languages (English, French, German, Spanish etc). Whenever you get a domain name suggestion…

## About this Engineer IV - Critical Facilities (Data Center Operations) role at Verisign
...
We are seeking an Engineer IV – Critical Facilities (Data Center Operations) to serve as a technical resource and leader within the Global Data Center Operations Team. This onsite role at our Ashburn Data Center will play a crucial role in the day-to-day operations & capacity planning of mission critical systems.
...
The ideal candidate will have technical and program management expertise in the maintenance and operation of electrical, mechanical, and fire life safety data center systems as well as applicable base building support systems. You will support the Sr. Manager of Data Center Operations as a technical lead. While this is an individual contributor role, you must be able to direct and inspire highly skilled engineers, deliver on project timelines and be the technical point of contact for on-call escalations. Clear and concise written and verbal communication skills along with experience developing Standard Operating Procedures, Emergency Operating Procedures and Method of Procedures utilizing technical writing standards are a must.
...
Mechanical responsibilities include chilled water systems and components, HVAC systems such as roof top units, CRAC/CRAH units, and humidification systems. Electrical responsibilities will include electrical/critical power distribution from the Utility/Generator main switchgear through the UPS, STS, and PDU system to the power on the data center floor. Fire Life Safety responsibilities will include wet sprinkler systems, pre-action sprinkler systems, clean agent fire suppression systems and fire alarm systems as well as their associated detection devices.
...
Data Center Operations as needed
...
equipment supporting the data centers are operating at
...
- identify Single Points of Failures (SPoF) and End of Life (EOL) equipment within existing design/architecture and drive prioritization/remediation efforts within the facility
...
- drive preventative maintenance best practices and oversight using Method of Procedures (MOP) and Emergency Operating Procedures (EOP) for the facility
...
identify root cause
...
present those findings to
...
- oversee multi-year capacity/growth critical facilities projects within the facility and build business cases to support the projects
...
The ideal candidate will have:
...
- a deep understanding of chiller, chilled water and air handler technologies and electrical switchgear, generators, load banks, UPS, STS, PDU, RPP, and batteries
...
- 7+ years’ relevant experience operating data centers in a technical lead individual contributor role
...
- a Mechanical, Electrical, or other related Engineering degree or equivalent job experience
...
- strong verbal and written communication skills
...
- direct experience with design, engineering, commissioning, and operations of data center electrical, mechanical, and fire/life safety equipment
...
- demonstrated expertise of the data center tier rating systems and design risk factors for resiliency and availability
...
- experience reviewing technical drawings to ensure installations and designs conform to industry best practices and standards
...
- experience in operations of large-scale data center environments
...
- existing data center service vendor relationships
...
- experience with Electrical Power Management Systems (EPMS) and Building Management Software (BMS)
...
- relevant industry certifications (NFPA, ATS, ATO, AOS, DCDC, etc)
...
This job is on-site and based in our Ashburn, Virginia area location. This is a first shift, Monday-Friday position.

results.title: Principal Data Scientist, Alpharetta, United States of America | Verizon Careers
highlights:
Principal Data Scientist, Alpharetta, United States of America | Verizon Careers
...
# Principal Data Scientist
...
- Alpharetta, Georgia
- Irving, Texas
- Basking Ridge, New Jersey
...
As a Principal Data Scientist in our Strategic Analytics & Modeling group, you are the intellectual engine translating complex data into executive-level strategy. Your mission is to deliver the "Deep Intelligence" that shapes our long-term business strategy. You will lead the development of advanced statistical models and rigorous analytical frameworks to solve unique business operations problems.
...
You aren’t just producing numbers; you are crafting the Business Case for our most significant investments. You will be a translator of complexity, leveraging LLMs and RAG architectures to synthesize vast amounts of internal data, turning the "noise" of global supply chain volatility, spend patterns, asset utilization etc. into clear, actionable insights for senior leadership. You will work in a high-maturity environment, leveraging Domino Data Lab and Gurobi to solve our most difficult optimization puzzles.
...
You will work with key stakeholders to generate hypotheses and create analytic models that answer our most impactful business questions. You are responsible for leading the design of data science products while thinking strategically about how these models meet the long-term goals of the business. You will leverage our full tech stack to develop resolutions to complex problems that require creativity, making decisions that directly impact Verizon's bottom line.
...
Architect AI-Driven Decision Systems: Design and implement RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems that ground LLMs in proprietary supply chain data to provide accurate, real-time strategic recommendations.
...
Optimize Complex Operations: Use Gurobi to solve high-dimensional supply chain constraints, moving beyond simple heuristics to find the mathematically "best" path for our global operations.
...
Accelerate with AI-Native Workflows: Utilize advanced coding assistants like Claude Code within VS Code to automate boilerplate and focus your energy on strategic problem-solving.
...
Drive Actionable Insights & Influencing: Lead end-to-end analytical projects, moving beyond "what happened" to prescribing solutions and proving the causal ROI of specific business interventions
...
Master Executive Storytelling: Use AI to help synthesize complex model outputs into high-impact narratives and "What-If" simulators that speak the language of the C-suite.
...
Partner Across the Ecosystem: Collaborate with our Innovation and Enablement teams to integrate models into a robust, strategically-aligned autonomous ecosystem.
...
’re looking for...
...
You are a "Strategic Scientist" who sees AI as a force multiplier. You have the technical depth to build a complex model from scratch, but the business acumen to know when an explainable model is the more powerful choice for a stakeholder. You thrive on the challenge of influencing a "room full of skeptics" with data-backed conviction.
...
You’ll need to have:
...
Bachelor’s degree or four or more years of work experience.
...
Six or more years of relevant experience required, demonstrated through one or a combination of work and/or military experience, or specialized training.
...
Experience as a data scientist, analyst, or statistical modeler.
...
Experience using LLMs or coding agents (e.g., Claude Code, GitHub Copilot) to enhance productivity and code quality.
...
Experience with Google BigQuery, Teradata, Python/R, SQL, Alteryx, and visualization tools like Tableau.
...
Degree in business intelligence and analytics, computer science, or mathematics.
...
Proven track record of presenting complex technical findings to non-technical senior executives.
...
Experience with Data Warehousing or Teradata SQL.
...
Knowledge of distributive computing tools, like Hive or Spark.
...
Experience with programming languages, like Java or Scala.

highlights:
Engr III Cslt-AI Science, Chennai, India | Verizon Careers

# Engr III Cslt-AI Science
...
- Chennai, India
...
- Hyderabad, India
...
This role will focus on architecting, developing, and deploying end-to-end, AI-powered commercial applications. This is a high-impact, individual contributor role demanding deep technical expertise across the modern software engineering stack and AI/Machine Learning methodologies
...
The Full Stack AI Engineer will work closely with data science, software engineering, and product teams at Verizon to proactively design and develop intelligent applications. These capabilities will encompass generative AI, predictive, prescriptive, and adaptive applications for all inferences at Verizon. Solutions will be implemented seamlessly from the user interface (front-end) to the database and infrastructure layer (back-end/cloud), operating in real-time, streaming, and batch modes depending on business needs.
...
At Verizon, we are on a multi-year journey to industrialize our data science and AI capabilities. Very simply, this means that AI will fuel all decisions and user experiences across the company. At $130B+ in annual revenue, this is a pioneering opportunity to design and shape full-stack AI at scale in the Telco industry. With our leadership in bringing 5G networks nationwide, the opportunity for AI will only grow exponentially. Therefore, it is critical that this candidate possesses proven experience in not just researching AI techniques, but actively engineering the scalable, full-stack applications that bring them to life.
...
Architect and Develop End-to-End AI Applications
...
Lead the full-stack development of next-generation AI applications, ensuring seamless integration between complex AI models (LLMs, predictive models) and modern web interfaces.
...
Design and deploy scalable APIs and microservices to serve machine learning models using modern frameworks (e.g., FastAPI, Node.js, GraphQL).
...
Develop intuitive, responsive front-end interfaces (React, Next.js, Vue) that allow users to interact with AI models effectively.
...
Implement robust backend architectures incorporating traditional and modern databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and Vector Databases like Pinecone or Milvus for RAG architectures).
...
Operate as an expert and thought leader in both Full Stack Engineering and AI/MLOps, establishing best practices for the CI/CD of machine learning applications.
...
Elevate the AI Practice
...
Partner with academia and the startup ecosystem to identify new AI approaches (e.g., Agentic AI, advanced GenAI workflows) and modern software tools that deliver value to Verizon.
...
looking for…
...
You will need to have:
...
Bachelor’s degree or four or more years of work experience.
...
Experience independently developing algorithms, writing production-grade code, and deploying complex software/AI solutions to production.
...
Experience scaling AI in commercial applications (e.g., Generative AI, Large Language Models (LLMs), Personalization, Computer Vision) and integrating them into full-stack applications.
...
Full Stack Development: Expertise in modern backend languages and frameworks (Python/FastAPI, Node.js, Go).Strong proficiency in modern frontend frameworks (React, Next.js, TypeScript/JavaScript, TailwindCSS).
...
AI/ML & Data Engineering: Deep understanding of underlying math/algorithms combined with expertise in ML frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow) and ML libraries (Scikit-learn, Hugging Face).Hands-on experience with modern AI stacks (LangChain, LlamaIndex, OpenAI APIs) and Vector Databases.
...
Infrastructure & Data: Experience with building and maintaining streaming and batch data pipelines (Kafka, Spark) in production.Strong knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, GCP) and container orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes).
...
Core Competencies: Exposure to advanced data structures, data modeling, and modern software architecture patterns.

# DNS-GSLB Security Engineer
...
Verizon Global Infrastructure (VGI) seeks a highly motivated Cybersecurity Engineer to continuously evolve security standards. This critical role involves hardening Verizon’s Network, Cloud, and Application environments within the GTS ecosystem by converting complex security challenges into robust, enterprise-grade solutions. Verisign (VRSN) is a Technology, Information and Internet company. Verisign is a global provider of domain name registry services and internet infrastructure. highlights:
Senior Engineering Manager Intern Program Manager at [
...
://www.linkedin.com
...
With over two decades of experience in software engineering and leadership — including 15+ years at Verisign — I manage highly available application delivery and security tools infrastructure that supports Verisign’s mission of 100% uptime for critical internet services. I oversee enterprise platforms such as GitHub, Jira, Jenkins, Artifactory, and NexusIQ, ensuring reliability, scalability, and security for global development operations. In addition to enterprise systems, I co-managed Verisign’s engineering intern program, collaborating with universities and business leaders to attract and mentor top talent. This role has allowed me to blend technical expertise with program leadership, fostering innovation and cross-team collaboration. Certified in project management (PMP), Agile (Scrum Master, SAFe), and cloud (AWS), I focus on building resilient, customer-centric systems that enable operational excellence. My career has spanned registry development, distributed systems, big data migrations, and cloud transformations — all with a commitment to advancing secure and reliable internet infrastructure. Alongside my role at Verisign, I serve as an Adjunct Faculty member at Johns Hopkins University, where I share industry experience with graduate students in the Computer Science program.
...
### Senior Engineering Manager Intern Program Manager at [VERISIGN](https://www.linkedin.com/company/verisign) (Current)
...
Verisign is the domain name registry for some of the world’s most trusted and reliable top-level domains like .com and .net. Verisign has managed this critical internet infrastructure for COM and NET TLDs for 25 years with 100 percent uptime and availability. Hari currently manages highly available application devilry and security tools infrastructure and is responsible for enterprise applications like GitHub, Jira, Jenkins, Artifactory, and NexusIQ. He also was a senior development manager of COM/NET registry development. Hari directed teams to implement resilient applications and batches that process domain name registrations using EPP (Extensible Provisioning Protocol). He modernized the architecture of monitoring and management platforms, making them resilient, highly available, and customer-centric for faster operational responsiveness. He managed a team to upgrade the billing, data escrow, and reporting infrastructures by extending/migrating existing Oracle and Golden Gate based architectures to Hadoop/BigData solutions. Hari also manages a wide range of on-demand and recurring organizational programs. He currently directs the engineering intern program with collaboration from recruiters, interns, hiring managers, VPs, and business leaders across Verisign. Hari developed strategies, managed road maps, and co-formulated objectives and critical milestones along with VPs. Hari regularly attends campus recruitment events, fostering relationships with various schools like UVA, VT, UMD-CP, and GMU. He conducts onsite interviews, hackathons, and other events to attract and hire the best talent. In addition, he supports various other programs like new-hire onboarding, divestiture employee support, security tools, and open source scanners evaluation, rolling over Virtual Desktop Infrastructures and engineering wide mac laptop re-paving, etc., Show less

results.title: [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II | Wfh
highlights:
# [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II
...
Note: The job is a remote job and is open to candidates in USA. Cotiviti is a healthcare technology company focused on delivering better care at lower costs through advanced technology and data analytics. The Senior Generative AI Scientist II will work with a team to solve healthcare issues using machine learning and AI techniques, delivering value through innovative data solutions. Responsibilities • Work with key stakeholders within Research and Development as well as Business Operations, along with Product Management to assess the potential value and risks associated with business problems that have the potential to be solved using machine learning and Artificial Intelligence techniques • Develop an exploratory data analysis approach to verify the initial hypothesis associated with potential Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning use cases • Document your approach, thinking and results in standard approaches to allow other data scientists to collaborate with you on this work • Prepare your final trained model and develop a validation test set for QA • Work with ML Ops/Production operations to deploy your model into production and support them in monitoring model performance • Participate in design sessions to continuously develop and improve the Cotiviti machine learning platform • Participate in other data science initiatives, collaborating with your peers to support their projects • Participate in knowledge sharing sessions to bring new insights and technologies to the team • Provide End to End value-based solutions, including data pipeline, model creation and application for end user consumption • Complete all responsibilities as outlined in the annual performance review and/or goal setting • Complete all special projects and other duties as assigned • Must be able to perform duties with or without reasonable accommodation Skills • Graduate degree in a quantitative discipline such as Computer Science/Engineering, Statistics, Operations Research covering Advanced Statistics, Machine learning and AI • Experience with the latest techniques in natural language processing including transformers, fine-tuning LLMs, measuring/benchmarking and deploying LLMs with tools such as HuggingFace, Langchain, LLAMA/Mistral and OpenAI, vector databases • 5+ years of hands-on data science/AI experience, using typical machine learning and data science tools including pandas, scikit-learn, keras, nltk, and TensorFlow/PyTorch, GPU • Experience building production-grade machine learning deployments on AWS, Azure, or GCP • Experience working with Apache Spark™ and large-scale distributed datasets • Experience communicating technical concepts to non-technical and technical audiences is a plus • Flexibility to work with global teams as well geographically dispersed US based teams • Professional with ability to properly handle confidential information • Ability to work within a matrixed organization • Proficiency in all required skills and competencies above Benefits • Medical • Dental • Vision • Disability • Life insurance coverage • 401(k) savings plans • Paid family leave • 9 paid holidays per year • 17-27 days of Paid Time Off (PTO) per year, depending on specific level and length of service with Cotiviti. Company Overview • Cotiviti enables healthcare organizations to deliver better care at lower cost through advanced technology and data analytics that improve the quality and sustainability of healthcare in the United States. It was founded in 1979, and is headquartered in South Jordan, UT, US, with a workforce of 5001-10000 employees. Its website is Company H1B Sponsorship • Cotiviti has a track record of offering H1B sponsorships, with 165 in 2025, 118 in 2024, 90 in 2023, 102 in 2022, 72 in 2021, 67 in 2020. Please note that this does not guarantee sponsorship for this specific role.

results.title: VP, Artificial Intelligence - Products & Services | CareerSync
highlights:
VP, Artificial Intelligence - Products & Services | Career
...
# VP, Artificial Intelligence - Products & Services
...
About the Role & TeamIDC is seeking a transformative AI leader to define and execute our enterprise-wide AI strategy—embedding cutting-edge artificial intelligence across both internal operations and customer-facing products. This is a rare opportunity to shape how a global data and intelligence company harnesses AI, from agentic workflows and large language models to predictive analytics and AI-native product experiences. Reporting directly to the CTO, the VP of AI will lead a high-performing technical team, partner across business units, and drive measurable business impact through intelligent, responsible, and scalable AI solutions. The ideal candidate combines deep technical expertise in modern AI—including generative AI, LLMs, and agentic systems—with the strategic acumen to align AI investments to revenue growth and competitive differentiation. IDC sits at the intersection of proprietary data, expert human insight, and global technology reach—an ideal foundation for AI transformation. Key opportunity areas include: AI-augmented research & analyst productivity — deploying LLM-powered tools to accelerate data synthesis, report generation, and market forecasting. Intelligent data products — embedding predictive models and AI-driven insights directly into IDC's subscription and advisory offerings. Agentic content & marketing workflows — leveraging generative AI to personalize content, automate content pipelines, and optimize Foundry's MarTech capabilities. Enterprise AI infrastructure — building shared platforms, APIs, and MLOps practices that enable AI adoption at scale across all IDC business units. What You’ll Do
...
AI Strategy & Vision: Partner with the CEO, CTO, CIO, and business unit heads to define IDC's multi-year AI roadmap—spanning generative AI, agentic systems, predictive analytics, and AI-native product development. Technical Leadership: Architect and oversee IDC's AI platform and infrastructure, ensuring scalability, security, and alignment with enterprise data strategy. Product Delivery: Develop and execute IDC’s approach to agentic AI technology, thereby delivering the centerpiece of IDC Quanta, our cross-channel technology intelligence layer. Team Building: Recruit, develop, and retain a world-class AI team spanning ML engineers, data scientists, AI product managers, and MLOps specialists. Stakeholder Alignment: Translate complex AI capabilities into clear business value for executives and department heads; maintain transparent goals and resource planning. Ecosystem & Partnerships: Evaluate and manage AI technology partnerships, vendor relationships, and open-source contributions to accelerate IDC's AI capabilities. What You Bring
...
PhD. or Master's degree in Computer Science, AI/ML, Statistics, or a related quantitative field (or equivalent experience).
...
7+ years of experience in applied machine learning, AI engineering, or data science—with at least 3 years in senior technical leadership roles.
...
reduction, or product differentiation).
...
Deep expertise in modern AI/ML and agentic/generative systems design.
...
Hands-on fluency with generative AI technologies: LLM fine-tuning, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), prompt engineering, and agentic frameworks (e.g., LangChain, LlamaIndex, AutoGen).
...
Strong engineering foundation: Python, SQL, cloud ML platforms (AWS SageMaker, GCP Vertex AI, or Azure ML), and modern MLOps practices (CI/CD, model monitoring, feature stores).
...
B SaaS, or
...
Tech industries.
...
Familiarity with knowledge graphs, semantic search, or AI applications in content and market research workflows.
...

...
Track record of building AI developer platforms or shared ML infrastructure used by multiple product teams.
